Polaris · Developer Handbook · feature

shell

Shell dev API (Iron Rule 8, ADR-0005): the dashboard chrome the root and dashboard layouts/pages compose.

guide activity auth landing notes shell

At a glance

3

public exports — the entire dev API

4

consumers in app routes

Generated from app/_features/shell/index.ts by npm run docs:surfaces — the code is the source of truth.

Dev API

What outsiders may import from @/app/_features/shell. Everything else in the folder is private (boundary rule D).

ExportKindSource module
ChunkErrorReloadercomponent./ChunkErrorReloader
DashboardNavcomponent./DashboardNav
PageHeadercomponent./PageHeader

Used by

Every place in the app that consumes this dev API today — found by scanning the route tree's imports.

Importing fileImports
app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsxDashboardNav
app/(dashboard)/layout.tsxPageHeader
app/layout.tsxChunkErrorReloader
app/page.tsxPageHeader
